---
title: "Visium V1 Spatial Transcriptomics: CD_PBS vs HFD_PBS vs HFD_TZP"
author: "Tao Sun"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
params:
  base_dir: "G:/changting_xiao_university_of_saskatoon"
  spaceranger_dir: "!r file.path(params$base_dir, 'SpaceRanger')"
  results_dir: "!r file.path(params$base_dir, 'results')"
  plots_dir: "!r file.path(params$base_dir, 'plots')"
  conditions: ["CD_PBS", "HFD_PBS", "HFD_TZP"]
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = TRUE)
```

# 1. Environment

## 1.1 Packages

```{r packages}
pkgs <- c(
  "Seurat", "SeuratObject", "hdf5r", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "patchwork",
  "future", "Matrix", "data.table", "stringr", "clusterProfiler",
  "org.Rn.eg.db", "enrichplot"
)
to_install <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if (length(to_install) > 0) {
  suppressMessages({
    if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
    bioc <- intersect(to_install, c("org.Rn.eg.db"))
    cran  <- setdiff(to_install, bioc)
    if (length(cran) > 0) install.packages(cran)
    if (length(bioc) > 0) BiocManager::install(bioc)
  })
}
lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

## 1.2 Paths

```{r paths}
base_dir       <- params$base_dir
spaceranger_dir<- params$spaceranger_dir
results_dir    <- params$results_dir
plots_dir      <- params$plots_dir
conditions     <- params$conditions

dirs <- c(results_dir, plots_dir)
invisible(lapply(dirs, function(p) if (!dir.exists(p)) dir.create(p, recursive = TRUE)))

print(list(
  base_dir = base_dir,
  spaceranger_dir = spaceranger_dir,
  results_dir = results_dir,
  plots_dir = plots_dir
))
```

# 2. Load SpaceRanger matrices (per condition)

```{r load_h5}
read_visium_h5 <- function(cond) {
  h5 <- file.path(spaceranger_dir, cond, "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5")
  stopifnot(file.exists(h5))
  obj <- Load10X_Spatial(
    data.dir = file.path(spaceranger_dir, cond),
    filename = "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5"
  )
  obj$condition <- cond
  return(obj)
}

cd_pbs  <- read_visium_h5("CD_PBS")
hfd_pbs <- read_visium_h5("HFD_PBS")
hfd_tzp <- read_visium_h5("HFD_TZP")

cd_pbs; hfd_pbs; hfd_tzp
```

# 3. QC metrics

```{r qc}
for (obj in list(cd_pbs, hfd_pbs, hfd_tzp)) {
  obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^mt-")
}
p1 <- VlnPlot(cd_pbs,  features = c("nFeature_Spatial","nCount_Spatial","percent.mt"), ncol=3) + ggtitle("CD_PBS")
p2 <- VlnPlot(hfd_pbs, features = c("nFeature_Spatial","nCount_Spatial","percent.mt"), ncol=3) + ggtitle("HFD_PBS")
p3 <- VlnPlot(hfd_tzp, features = c("nFeature_Spatial","nCount_Spatial","percent.mt"), ncol=3) + ggtitle("HFD_TZP")
p_all <- p1 / p2 / p3
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "QC_VlnPlots.png"), p_all, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
p_all
```

## 3.1 Filter spots

```{r filter}
cd_pbs   <- subset(cd_pbs,  subset = nFeature_Spatial > 200 & nFeature_Spatial < 7000 & percent.mt < 20)
hfd_pbs  <- subset(hfd_pbs, subset = nFeature_Spatial > 200 & nFeature_Spatial < 7000 & percent.mt < 20)
hfd_tzp  <- subset(hfd_tzp, subset = nFeature_Spatial > 200 & nFeature_Spatial < 7000 & percent.mt < 20)

sapply(list(cd_pbs=cd_pbs,hfd_pbs=hfd_pbs,hfd_tzp=hfd_tzp), ncol)
```

# 4. SCTransform (per condition)

```{r sct, cache=TRUE}
library(glmGamPoi)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 2 * 1024^3)
plan("sequential")  # safer for Windows

cd_pbs  <- SCTransform(cd_pbs,  assay = "Spatial", return.only.var.genes = FALSE, verbose = TRUE)
hfd_pbs <- SCTransform(hfd_pbs, assay = "Spatial", return.only.var.genes = FALSE, verbose = TRUE)
hfd_tzp <- SCTransform(hfd_tzp, assay = "Spatial", return.only.var.genes = FALSE, verbose = TRUE)
```

# 5. Integrate datasets

```{r integrate}
# Shared features to avoid subscript issues
common.features <- Reduce(intersect, list(rownames(cd_pbs), rownames(hfd_pbs), rownames(hfd_tzp)))
cd_pbs  <- subset(cd_pbs,  features = common.features)
hfd_pbs <- subset(hfd_pbs, features = common.features)
hfd_tzp <- subset(hfd_tzp, features = common.features)

gut.features <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = list(cd_pbs, hfd_pbs, hfd_tzp), nfeatures = 3000)
gut.list     <- PrepSCTIntegration(object.list = list(cd_pbs, hfd_pbs, hfd_tzp), anchor.features = gut.features)
anchors      <- FindIntegrationAnchors(object.list = gut.list, normalization.method = "SCT", anchor.features = gut.features)
gut.integrated <- IntegrateData(anchorset = anchors, normalization.method = "SCT")

gut.integrated <- RunPCA(gut.integrated, verbose = FALSE)
gut.integrated <- RunUMAP(gut.integrated, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
gut.integrated <- FindNeighbors(gut.integrated, dims = 1:20)
gut.integrated <- FindClusters(gut.integrated, resolution = 0.5)

DimPlot(gut.integrated, group.by = "condition", pt.size = 0.5)
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "UMAP_condition.png"), width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
DimPlot(gut.integrated, label=TRUE, repel=TRUE, pt.size = 0.5)
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "UMAP_clusters.png"), width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(gut.integrated, file.path(results_dir, "gut_integrated.rds"))
```

# 6. Marker-guided annotation

```{r annotate}
epi_markers <- c("Vil1","Alpi","Apoa1","Apoa4")
smc_markers <- c("Acta2")

DefaultAssay(gut.integrated) <- "SCT"
gut.integrated$cell_type <- "Other"
epi_score <- Matrix::colSums(GetAssayData(gut.integrated, slot="data")[epi_markers, , drop=FALSE])
smc_score <- Matrix::colSums(GetAssayData(gut.integrated, slot="data")[smc_markers, , drop=FALSE])

gut.integrated$cell_type[epi_score > quantile(epi_score, 0.7)] <- "Epithelial"
gut.integrated$cell_type[smc_score > quantile(smc_score, 0.7)] <- "SMC"

table(gut.integrated$cell_type)
saveRDS(gut.integrated, file.path(results_dir, "gut_integrated_labeled.rds"))
```

## 6.1 Marker visualization

```{r marker-plots}
FeaturePlot(gut.integrated, features = c("Vil1","Alpi","Apoa1","Apoa4"), combine = TRUE)
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "Epithelial_markers.png"), width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
FeaturePlot(gut.integrated, features = c("Acta2"))
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "SMC_marker_Acta2.png"), width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

# 7. Split objects

```{r split}
epi <- subset(gut.integrated, subset = cell_type == "Epithelial")
smc <- subset(gut.integrated, subset = cell_type == "SMC")
table(epi$condition); table(smc$condition)
```

# 8. DEG analysis (Wilcoxon)

```{r deg-epi}
deg_HFDvsCD  <- FindMarkers(epi, ident.1 = "HFD_PBS", ident.2 = "CD_PBS",  logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1, test.use = "wilcox")
deg_TZPvsHFD <- FindMarkers(epi, ident.1 = "HFD_TZP", ident.2 = "HFD_PBS", logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1, test.use = "wilcox")

write.csv(deg_HFDvsCD,  file.path(results_dir, "DEG_Epithelial_HFDvsCD.csv"))
write.csv(deg_TZPvsHFD, file.path(results_dir, "DEG_Epithelial_TZPvsHFD.csv"))

deg_summary <- data.frame(
  Comparison = c("HFD_PBS vs CD_PBS", "HFD_TZP vs HFD_PBS"),
  Upregulated = c(sum(deg_HFDvsCD$avg_log2FC  > 0 & deg_HFDvsCD$p_val_adj  < 0.05),
                  sum(deg_TZPvsHFD$avg_log2FC > 0 & deg_TZPvsHFD$p_val_adj < 0.05)),
  Downregulated = c(sum(deg_HFDvsCD$avg_log2FC  < 0 & deg_HFDvsCD$p_val_adj  < 0.05),
                    sum(deg_TZPvsHFD$avg_log2FC < 0 & deg_TZPvsHFD$p_val_adj < 0.05))
)
write.csv(deg_summary, file.path(results_dir, "DEG_Summary_Epithelial.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
deg_summary
```

```{r deg-smc}
deg_HFDvsCD_SMC  <- FindMarkers(smc, ident.1 = "HFD_PBS", ident.2 = "CD_PBS",  logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1, test.use = "wilcox")
deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC <- FindMarkers(smc, ident.1 = "HFD_TZP", ident.2 = "HFD_PBS", logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1, test.use = "wilcox")

write.csv(deg_HFDvsCD_SMC,  file.path(results_dir, "DEG_SMC_HFDvsCD.csv"))
write.csv(deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC, file.path(results_dir, "DEG_SMC_TZPvsHFD.csv"))

deg_summary_SMC <- data.frame(
  Comparison = c("HFD_PBS vs CD_PBS", "HFD_TZP vs HFD_PBS"),
  Upregulated = c(sum(deg_HFDvsCD_SMC$avg_log2FC  > 0 & deg_HFDvsCD_SMC$p_val_adj  < 0.05),
                  sum(deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$avg_log2FC > 0 & deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$p_val_adj < 0.05)),
  Downregulated = c(sum(deg_HFDvsCD_SMC$avg_log2FC  < 0 & deg_HFDvsCD_SMC$p_val_adj  < 0.05),
                    sum(deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$avg_log2FC < 0 & deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$p_val_adj < 0.05))
)
write.csv(deg_summary_SMC, file.path(results_dir, "DEG_Summary_SMC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
deg_summary_SMC
```

# 9. Save significant gene lists

```{r sig-lists}
epi_HFDvsCD_sig  <- rownames(deg_HFDvsCD)[deg_HFDvsCD$p_val_adj  < 0.05]
epi_TZPvsHFD_sig <- rownames(deg_TZPvsHFD)[deg_TZPvsHFD$p_val_adj < 0.05]
smc_HFDvsCD_sig  <- rownames(deg_HFDvsCD_SMC)[deg_HFDvsCD_SMC$p_val_adj  < 0.05]
smc_TZPvsHFD_sig <- rownames(deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC)[deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$p_val_adj < 0.05]

writeLines(epi_HFDvsCD_sig,  file.path(results_dir, "Genes_Epithelial_HFDvsCD_sig.txt"))
writeLines(epi_TZPvsHFD_sig, file.path(results_dir, "Genes_Epithelial_TZPvsHFD_sig.txt"))
writeLines(smc_HFDvsCD_sig,  file.path(results_dir, "Genes_SMC_HFDvsCD_sig.txt"))
writeLines(smc_TZPvsHFD_sig, file.path(results_dir, "Genes_SMC_TZPvsHFD_sig.txt"))
```

# 10. GO enrichment (TZP vs HFD)

```{r go-epi}
epi_entrez <- bitr(rownames(deg_TZPvsHFD)[deg_TZPvsHFD$p_val_adj < 0.05], fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb=org.Rn.eg.db)
go_epi <- enrichGO(gene = epi_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Rn.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID",
                   ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.05, readable = TRUE)
go_epi_res <- as.data.frame(go_epi)[1:20, ]
write.csv(go_epi_res, file.path(results_dir, "GO_Epithelial_TZPvsHFD_sig.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
p_go_epi <- barplot(go_epi, showCategory = 20, title = "GO BP: Epithelial TZP vs HFD")
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "GO_Epithelial_TZPvsHFD_sig.png"), p_go_epi, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r go-smc}
smc_entrez <- bitr(rownames(deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC)[deg_TZPvsHFD_SMC$p_val_adj < 0.05], fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb=org.Rn.eg.db)
go_smc <- enrichGO(gene = smc_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Rn.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID",
                   ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.05, readable = TRUE)
go_smc_res <- as.data.frame(go_smc)[1:20, ]
write.csv(go_smc_res, file.path(results_dir, "GO_SMC_TZPvsHFD_sig.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
p_go_smc <- barplot(go_smc, showCategory = 20, title = "GO BP: SMC TZP vs HFD")
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "GO_SMC_TZPvsHFD_sig.png"), p_go_smc, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

# 11. Comparison figure

```{r compare}
combine_top <- function(df, label) {
  df <- head(df, 10)
  df$CellType <- label
  df
}
ep <- combine_top(read.csv(file.path(results_dir, "GO_Epithelial_TZPvsHFD_sig.csv")), "Epithelial")
sm <- combine_top(read.csv(file.path(results_dir, "GO_SMC_TZPvsHFD_sig.csv")),       "SMC")
cmp <- rbind(ep, sm)

cmp$Description <- ifelse(nchar(cmp$Description) > 45, paste0(substr(cmp$Description, 1, 42), "..."), cmp$Description)

p_cmp <- ggplot(cmp, aes(x = reorder(Description, -log10(p.adjust)), y = -log10(p.adjust), fill = CellType)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Comparison of GO Enrichment: Epithelial vs SMC (TZP vs HFD)",
       x = "GO Biological Process", y = "-log10(adj. p)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "GO_Comparison_Epithelial_vs_SMC_TZPvsHFD.png"), p_cmp, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
p_cmp
```

# 12. Session info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
